mapper.insert: INSERT INTO watched_movies (user_id, movie_id, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{movieId}, #{createTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM watched_movies WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND movie_id = #{movieId}
mapper.select: SELECT user_id as userId, movie_id as movieId, create_time as createTime FROM watched_movies WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND movie_id = #{movieId} LIMIT 1

SELECT m.movie_id, m.name, m.cover, m.douban_score as score, m.douban_votes as votes, m.genres, m.year, m.directors, m.actors, m.regions, m.mins, m.storyline, DATE_FORMAT(w.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as watched_time FROM movies m JOIN watched_movies w ON m.movie_id = w.movie_id WHERE w.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY w.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM watched_movies WHERE user_id = #{userId}
